gui.ragnarmmo.achievements.title: Achievements
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.abyssal_fang.desc: A deep-sea edge with a weightier bite than most daggers dare carry.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.gale_dirk.desc: A light dirk balanced for quick footwork and rapid follow-ups.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.ghostly_sting.des: Its pale edge slips in before most enemies even react.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.glacial_shard.des: A knife of frozen crystal that rewards precise, patient strikes.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.mambas_kiss.desc: A venomous-looking fang designed for evasive skirmishers.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.oathbreaker.desc: A grim ceremonial blade that hits harder than its slim shape suggests.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.quake_stiletto.de: A dense thrusting blade built to punch through guard and armor seams.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.shadows_embrace.d: A dark-edge blade that disappears easily between cloak and heartbeat.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.twilight_carver.d: A dusk-forged knife meant to end fights before dawn can witness them.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.valkyries_thorn.d: A sacred thornblade carried by assassins who still honor the light.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.vein_seeker.desc: A surgical dagger made for hunters who value dexterity over brute force.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.volcanic_tooth.de: A jagged fang-tempered dagger that favors relentless close pressure.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.catacomb_breaker: A bone-dark mace favored in grim tomb raids.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.ember_flail.desc: A burning headpiece that crushes armor with short explosive arcs.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.frost_mallet.des: A cold-weight hammer that turns measured swings into crushing hits.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.gilded_comet.des: A decorated flanged mace that still fights like a true workhorse.
A compact iron beater made for clerics who fight up close.
A sanctified weapon that blurs the line between relic and mace.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.meteor_star.desc: A spiked head that lands like a falling ember.
A dark crushing rod designed for stubborn armored foes.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.oracle_ram.desc: An ornate priestly mace for battle chants and broken bones alike.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.pilgrim_maul.des: Simple in shape, brutal in impact, and easy to trust.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.storm_morningsta: An iron starhead that punishes anything caught in its path.
item.ragnarmmo.maces_1h.sunburst_pernach: A bright war mace built to stagger shield walls.
Heavy enough to anchor a front line on its own.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.bronze_buckler.de: A simple shield that still holds the line when it matters.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.dawnward_kite.des: A radiant kite shield trusted by caravan vanguards.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.eclipse_pavise.de: A broad black shield that turns defense into presence.
A heraldic shield that favors resolve over ornament.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.moonglass_bulwark: A polished barrier with a cool reflective sheen.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.pilgrim_barrier.d: A traveler's shield built for long roads and rough ambushes.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.suncrest_guard.de: A proud crest shield with the bearing of a temple sentinel.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.thornwall.desc: A harsh-faced shield that looks ready to answer every blow.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.umbral_aegis.desc: A dark shield whose layered metal swallows the light.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.valkyrie_ward.des: A sharp-winged guardpiece fit for holy champions.
item.ragnarmmo.shields.violet_guard.desc: A gem-cored shield made for disciplined defenders.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.dawnmantle_staff.d: A bright support staff fit for healers and battle priests.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.dreamwood_staff.de: A pale focus staff prized by wandering sages.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.duskpetal_staff.de: A flowered staff that settles mana at the end of each cast.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.embervine_staff.de: A fire-laced staff made for aggressive spell rotations.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.magma_serpent_staf: A twisting fire staff that carries dangerous heat.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.moonlily_staff.des: A lunar staff that hums softly before each invocation.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.oracle_branch.desc: A diviner's branch that turns calm focus into clear power.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.starseeker_staff.d: A scholar's staff that rewards patient, deliberate casting.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.sunpriest_staff.de: A ceremonial staff that keeps prayer and spellwork aligned.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.thornhalo_staff.de: Its crown of thorns grants authority to every cast.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.tidebloom_staff.de: A coastal focus crowned with petals and soft blue current.
item.ragnarmmo.staves.verdant_crook.desc: A living branch-staff with a calm, stable mana flow.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.abyss_needle.de: A dark needle-sword for duelists who trust a single perfect opening.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.ashen_rapier.de: A lean dueling sword for fighters who win through tempo and reach.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.azure_fang.desc: A blue-forged blade with a lively, balanced swing.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.cinder_brand.de: Its ember-lined edge encourages aggressive front-line trades.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.crimson_talon.d: A fierce red blade made to pressure wounded prey.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.dawn_edge.desc: A bright field sword meant for clean cuts and consistent pressure.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.frostwake_blade: A cold-edged sword that favors disciplined swordplay.
A clean, dependable saber with a smooth draw and recovery.
A pale lunar blade that rewards accuracy and calm hands.
A radiant sword with the poise of a knightly heirloom.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.verdant_blade.d: A green-tempered saber prized by wandering mercenaries.
item.ragnarmmo.swords_1h.warden_estoc.de: A long thrusting blade trusted by city guards and line breakers.
tooltip.ragnarmmo.boss_sigil.space_block: The altar space above is blocked.
tooltip.ragnarmmo.boss_sigil.unconfigure: This sigil is not configured yet.
tooltip.ragnarmmo.boss_sigil.use_lodesto: Use on top of a Lodestone altar.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.arc_lattice_wand.de: A wire-thin focus that excels at repeated short casts.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.duskroot_wand.desc: A bent rootwood wand that hums under twilight mana.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.ember_hook_wand.des: A hooked wand that seems to catch sparks out of the air.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.frostthorn_wand.des: A cold wand with a sharp crystal spine and excellent focus.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.gilded_crook.desc: An ornate wand for magicians who like their tools refined.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.moonring_wand.desc: A slender ring-tipped wand that channels spells with little wasted motion.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.runebriar_wand.desc: A runed briar focus that sharpens the will behind each spell.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.sageglass_wand.desc: A clear focus wand for apprentices who value stability.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.starlit_switch.desc: A polished casting switch meant for agile support mages.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.suncoil_wand.desc: A warm golden conductor tuned for steady casting.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.thunderbloom_wand.d: Its blooming arc favors quick elemental bursts over raw force.
item.ragnarmmo.wands.whisperstem_wand.de: A quiet branch-wand favored by careful elementalists.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.ash_reaver.de: A soot-dark axe that leans into raw finishing power.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.brass_cleaver: A gold-lined cleaver head that still means business.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.ember_halberd: A pole-heavy axe adapted for brutal one-hand chops.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.frost_crescen: A pale crescent axe with a keen, chilling bite.
A long-hafted axe for disciplined merchants and guards.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.iron_harveste: A rough field axe reforged for battle.
Runed steel packed into a compact one-hand frame.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.scarlet_loppe: A brutal red axe favored by shock troops.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.stormsplitter: A twin-edged axe that hits like a lightning crack.
item.ragnarmmo.war_axes_1h.sunmaw_axe.de: A bright-bitted war axe that cuts clean and hard.
A stubborn iron axe that shines in drawn-out fights.
A hooked battle axe made to drag targets off balance.

message.ragnarmmo.roitems.class_required: Your class cannot use this item
message.ragnarmmo.skill_blocked_type: This skill cannot affect that target type.
message.ragnarmmo.skill_no_target_block: You need to target a valid block.
message.ragnarmmo.skill_passive: This is a passive skill and cannot be cast manually.
message.ragnarmmo.skill_wrong_job: Your current job cannot use this skill.
message.ragnarmmo.unspent_skill_points: You cannot change Job with unspent Skill Points!

screen.ragnarmmo.skill_wheel.title: Skill Wheel
screen.ragnarmmo.skills.title: Skills
screen.ragnarmmo.title: Ragnar-Werte
skill.ragnarmmo.bash.desc:
Active Skill.
Strikes a single target with a heavy bash to deal high Physical Damage.
Damage scales with Skill Level.
skill.ragnarmmo.basic_conditioning.desc:
Passive Skill.
Permanently increases max HP and improves natural HP/SP regeneration rates.
skill.ragnarmmo.beast_bane.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical damage against Brute and Insect monsters.
skill.ragnarmmo.blitz_beat.desc:
Active Skill.
Commands your Falcon to barrage the target, dealing multiple strikes that ignore Defense and Flee.
skill.ragnarmmo.bow_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical Attack damage and Range when equipped with a Bow.
skill.ragnarmmo.bowling_bash.desc:
Active Skill.
Forcefully smashes an enemy into others behind it, dealing massive splash damage to the group.
skill.ragnarmmo.brandish_spear.desc:
Active Skill.
Violently swings your Spear forward, dealing damage to all enemies in a cone area.
skill.ragnarmmo.cold_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Strikes a target with magical ice spears falling from the sky (Water Property).
skill.ragnarmmo.critical_shot.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Critical Hit Rate percentage.
Critical hits ignore enemy defense.
skill.ragnarmmo.dagger_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical Attack damage when equipped with a Dagger.
skill.ragnarmmo.double_strafe.desc:
Active Skill.
Rapidly fires two arrows at a single target with high accuracy and damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.elemental_affinity.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases damage dealt with Fire, Water, Wind, and Earth commands.
skill.ragnarmmo.endurance.desc:
Active/Passive Skill.
Increases Magic Defense and grants resistance to flinch/stun effects for a duration when activated.
skill.ragnarmmo.excavation.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases the chance to uncover artifacts or treasure when digging dirt/gravel.
skill.ragnarmmo.exploration.desc:
Life Skill.
Grants bonuses for discovering unexplored chunks and structures.
skill.ragnarmmo.faith.desc:
Passive Skill.
Permanently increases Max HP and resistance to Holy property attacks.
skill.ragnarmmo.farming.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases the growth rate of crops and the yield at harvest.
skill.ragnarmmo.fatal_instinct.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases the damage multiplier of Critical Hits.
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_ball.desc:
Active Skill.
Shoots a fiery ball that explodes upon impact, damaging the target and surrounding enemies (Fire).
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Strikes a target by summoning flaming meteors from the sky (Fire Property).
skill.ragnarmmo.first_aid.desc:
Active Skill.
Consumes SP to restore a small amount of HP.
Essential for novice survival.
skill.ragnarmmo.fishing.desc:
Life Skill.
Reduces time to bite and increases chance to catch rare fish or treasure.
skill.ragnarmmo.freezing_trap.desc:
Active Skill.
Places a magical trap on the ground that freezes all enemies in an area when triggered.
skill.ragnarmmo.heal.desc:
Active Skill.
Uses divine light to restore HP to an ally or yourself. Deals holy damage to Undead.
skill.ragnarmmo.heal_power.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases the effectiveness of Heal and other restorative skills.
skill.ragnarmmo.ice_wall.desc:
Active Skill.
Erects a thick, impenetrable magical wall of solid ice to block enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.lightning_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Calls down magical lightning bolts to strike the target directly from above (Wind Property).
skill.ragnarmmo.lord_of_vermillion.desc:
Active Skill.
Summons a devastating massive thunderstorm that smites the area and blinds enemies (Wind).
skill.ragnarmmo.mace_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical Attack damage when equipped with a Mace or Hammer.
skill.ragnarmmo.magic_guard.desc:
Active Toggle.
Creates a barrier that consumes SP instead of HP when taking damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.magnificat.desc:
Active Skill.
Temporarily doubles the natural HP and SP regeneration rate for the entire party.
skill.ragnarmmo.mana_control.desc:
Passive Skill.
Improves natural SP regeneration while standing still or walking.
Reduces downtime between fights.
skill.ragnarmmo.meteor_storm.desc:
Active Skill.
Causes several destructive meteors to randomly shower down upon the targeted area (Fire).
skill.ragnarmmo.mining.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases mining speed and the chance to find rare ores/gems.
skill.ragnarmmo.overcast.desc:
Active Toggle.
Allows spells to be cast with increased power at the cost of significantly higher SP consumption and cast time.
skill.ragnarmmo.overcharge.desc:
Passive Skill.
Allows you to sell items to NPC vendors for a higher price.
skill.ragnarmmo.pierce.desc:
Active Skill.
Rapidly stabs a target with a spear. The damage multi-hits and scales based on the monster's size.
skill.ragnarmmo.provoke.desc:
Active Skill.
Taunts an enemy, decreasing their Physical Defense but increasing their Attack Power.
Useful for tanking or weakening high-defense targets.
skill.ragnarmmo.safety_wall.desc:
Active skill.
Available to: Mage, Priest.
skill.ragnarmmo.sanctuary.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates a holy field that heals players and damages/repels Demons and Undead.
skill.ragnarmmo.spear_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical Attack Power and Accuracy when equipping a Spear weapon.
skill.ragnarmmo.spell_knowledge.desc:
Passive Skill.
Reduces the variable cast time of all magical spells.
Higher levels allow for rapid-fire casting.
skill.ragnarmmo.staff_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Magic Attack (MATK) when equipped with a Staff or Rod.
Essential for maximizing spell damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.storm_gust.desc:
Active Skill.
Conjures a lethal and massive blizzard that severely damages and freezes enemies in the area (Water).
skill.ragnarmmo.sword_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack damage when equipped with a Sword class weapon.
Mastery improves base damage per level.
skill.ragnarmmo.weapon_trainer.desc:
Passive Skill.
A basic training regimen that slightly increases physical damage with all weapon types.
skill.ragnarmmo.wind_walker.desc:
Active Party Buff.
Increases Movement Speed and Flee Rate for yourself and nearby party members.
skill.ragnarmmo.woodcutting.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases chopping speed and the yield of wood logs.
tooltip.ragnarmmo.weight.label: Weight
